creator: eilts@tor.muc.de
text:
On the FreeBSD-PC a newsserver INN-14.sec is running. Both an nn-6.5.0
	(NOV) connecting from NeXTStation and a nn-6.5.0 (NOV) on the FreeBSD
	PC _compiled with FreeBSD 2.1 _ ar ok. But a nn-6.5.0b3 from the 2.2
        ports always exit with "No News (are good news)" leaving .newsrc with
	all artivles marked read.

Fix: 

?
How-To-Repeat: 
	See above.
